name: workflow-execution
description: The one artifact template that turns a workflow definition into a live workflow-execution artifact. Single step — instantiate — calls `execution.create` via the configured provider (default gh-pr) with the workflow's inputs and the owning GitHub user. Invoked by `/workflow start <workflow>` and by every step in every other workflow that composes a sub-workflow.

inputs.name: workflow
inputs.description: URI or name of the workflow definition to run.

inputs.name: workflow_inputs
inputs.description: Map of inputs to pass to the workflow. Validated against the workflow's declared inputs.

inputs.name: parent_execution
inputs.description: Parent execution URI when this is a sub-workflow dispatch.

inputs.name: target_repo
inputs.description: <owner>/<repo>. Required when the execution provider needs it (gh-pr default does).

inputs.name: owner
inputs.description: GH user taking ownership. Defaults to `gh auth` user.

steps.description: Resolve workflow; validate workflow_inputs against the workflow's inputs contract; call `execution.create` via the configured provider with the rendered payload; return the URI.
